name: Galaxy Journey
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>銀河超航行</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ギャラクシー・ジャーニー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Special Summon 1 of your banished LIGHT or DARK monsters. If a face-up Xyz Monster(s) you control is banished, while this card is in your GY (except during the Damage Step): You can banish this card, then target 1 of those monsters; Special Summon it. You can only use each effect of "Galaxy Journey" once per turn.
eff: Special Summon 1 of your banished LIGHT or DARK monsters. If a face-up Xyz Monster(s) you control is banished, while this card is in your GY (except during the Damage Step): You can banish this card, then target 1 of those monsters; Special Summon it. You can only use each effect of "Galaxy Journey" once per turn.

action: Activates if other cards are banished
summoning: Special Summons the player's banished monsters
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
